Web sites for job listings

October 1996
Journalism & Newsroom

A guide to online job listing resources for journalism and media professionals, including TV stations, Gannett positions, and IDG publishing careers.

Here are some Web sites for job listings recently posted in NICAR-L For TV jobs, try http://www.tvjobs.com, with links to a lot of individual station's Web sites. Gannett has updated its homepage to include job postings from all departments, including advertising, circulation, finance, human resources, marketing, news, online, production and systems. Check the "Job Opportunities" listing on the company's homepage at: http://www.gannett.com.

IDG publishes computer-related publications from news-focused weeklies such as Network World to more feature-oriented publications such as PC World and Macworld. You can find job listings at: http://www.idg.com/idg/careers/listing/
